extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed against the Company from matters filed by the Company: against rows counted were 1 regulatory/statutory action, 10 indirect-tax matters, 3 direct-tax matters, and Nil criminal proceedings; the 99 criminal proceedings and ₹19.62 million in the 'filed by our Company' rows were excluded. Tax proceedings against the Company total 13, regulatory actions against total 1, and the quantified against-company amount is ₹529.76 million, comprising ₹2.28 million regulatory, ₹264.14 million indirect tax, ₹2.82 million direct tax, and ₹260.52 million material civil litigation; these components are treated as separate table categories. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹315.86 million as of September 30, 2020, not a re-sum of line items. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration percentage is disclosed; the disclosed concentration percentages relate to geography, not customers. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10: ₹529.76 million = ₹52.976 crore and ₹315.86 million = ₹31.586 crore.
